meta.title: DEF CON 33 - BiC Village - How AI Is Revolutionizing Phishing Attacks & Defenses - Levone Campbell
meta.description: This thought-provoking session dives into the dual-edged role of artificial intelligence in the phishing ecosystem. On one side, AI is enabling attackers to craft more convincing and scalable phishing campaigns, making detection increasingly difficult. On the other, it's empowering defenders with smarter tools for real-time detection, adaptive filtering, and behavioral analysis.
